title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: Tutorial on building a real-world multi-agent AI system using LangGraph with four specialized agents (flight, hotel, itinerary, response) that coordinate to create an AI travel planner. The project integrates Llama 3.3 70B via Groq, PostgreSQL for memory, real-time APIs for flight and hotel data, and Streamlit for the interface.
